name: HWR_GBL_PRFL_SKILL
description: Table storing information on skill assosiated to a global profile. Score, percentile rank, accepted/rejected and relevance.

columns.Name: GBL_PRFL_SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the global profile topic table

columns.Name: GBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is a a foreign key to global profile tables.

columns.Name: FUS_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the fusion profile ID of the employee.

columns.Name: TOPIC_ID
columns.Comments: The topic Id. This is a foreign key from the topic tables.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicate if a change was made to a statement related to the global profile skill

columns.Name: RAW_SCORE
columns.Comments: Raw score of the global profile skill calculated using the related statment

columns.Name: PERCENTILE
columns.Comments: Percentile rank of the user skill compared with other global profile

columns.Name: RELEVANCE_VALUE
columns.Comments: Relevance score for the skill for the global profile

columns.Name: IS_REJECTED
columns.Comments: Specify if the skill exist or is discovered 0 = Discovered, 2 = Existing

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
